publishedAbstract: * New disks added to storage nodes, fail to provision as up/in in the Ceph tree * Despite successful PV creation, Data Foundation fails to increase capacity through Web Console * Process stabilizes but no additional capacity is reflected in ocs-storagecluster-storagesystem
publishedTitle: Failed to Provision New OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) OSDs - "detected an existing OSD. UUID=(UUID-Name)" Due to OOMKill on rook-ceph-osd-prepare Pods.
